element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Chain reactions to eliminate multiple enemies

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones between enemy encounters
typical_tension_triggers: Time limit approaching (pumpkin head spawn imminent)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure with time-based threat; tension builds through time limits and enemy density, punctuated by boss gates every 10 stages

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden bonus secrets distributed throughout stages; bonus money drops from sky when all enemies eliminated via single snowball chain
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden bonuses are crucial for high-scores and extra lives but not required for progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to snowball mechanics, basic enemy types, simple level layouts with time pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and variety, more complex stage layouts, introduction of all potion types, escalating time pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminating in boss encounters; stages 40-50 feature significantly increased difficulty with dense enemy patterns and reduced completion time tolerance
notable_spikes: Stage 50 - Final boss encounter and game conclusion

notable_level_patterns.description: Every 10th stage features a mandatory boss fight that must be defeated before progressing. Acts as major difficulty checkpoint and progression gate.
Stages progressively reduce completion time allowance, forcing faster enemy elimination and strategic potion usage. Extended delays trigger pumpkin head and ghost spawns.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout all 50 stages with increasing severity

notable_level_patterns.description: Potion drops are random from defeated enemies; players must adapt strategy based on available power-ups (red/blue/yellow/green potions) and plan optimal chain reactions.
Completing a stage by eliminating all enemies with a single snowball chain triggers bonus money reward, incentivizing advanced play and precision.
